issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate workflow branches, causing HAs and TCs to receive double tasks across multiple workflows including post-referral and pre-referral. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Issue was resolved after working with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks to avoid double-processing.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the workflow tasks did not re-trigger. This affected HAs and TCs who manage deals that fall out of contract and go back under contract. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were moved to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continuing after deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. This caused confusion and unnecessary follow-up on dead deals. A tweak was made to the workflow filters to suppress tasks for these deal stages.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks that were generated for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's name rather than the updated one. This affected agent-facing emails and potentially client communications. The issue was resolved by Luis and was determined to be a product-level fix.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any agent or client emails that went out with the incorrect LO name during the impact window.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks for referral accepted on March 18th
issues.desc: A referral accepted on March 18th did not generate any post-referral workflow tasks for the HA. The root cause was identified as an error in how data was being pulled, preventing the workflow from filtering correctly. The issue was escalated to product for resolution.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals referred around March 18th that did not receive post-referral tasks and follow up manually on any missed touchpoints.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent in Offer Accepted stage without credit amount populated
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their buyer credit amount was firing in the Offer Accepted stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in a message with a blank credit amount. The SMS should only trigger in the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is calculable. The issue was confirmed as a dash-triggered communication and escalated to product.
issues.workaround: Manually send the correct buyer credit SMS with the accurate dollar amount to any buyers who received the blank credit SMS during the impact window.
